title: oenanthe stolonifera var. laciniata
intro: Oenanthe stolonifera var. laciniata, also known as Japanese water parsley or thread-leaf water parsley, is a variant of the Oenanthe stolonifera plant, a type of aquatic plant commonly found in East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of Oenanthe stolonifera var. laciniata include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
